case_title: MATTHEW LEFFERS VS. MARK WELLER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEFFERS, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLER, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 287 SANCHEZ STREET #4, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, LEASE FORFEITED, ORIGINAL LEASE STAMPED: JUDGMENT RENDERED HEREON.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $60.00 PER DAY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, MARK
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEFFERS, MATTHEW ON DEFENDANT WELLER, MARK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEFFERS, MATTHEW SERVED OCT-20-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, MARK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT -THEN POSTING & MAILING - OCT. 20, 2005, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEFFERS, MATTHEW SERVED OCT-20-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, MARK
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, MARK
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEFFERS, MATTHEW
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEFFERS, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT WELLER, MARK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
